title: arenaria graminifolia var. pubescens
intro: Arenaria graminifolia var. pubescens, also known as sea sandwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family. It is native to Europe and is commonly found in coastal areas and salt marshes. Arenaria graminifolia var. pubescens has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system.
